headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Waste Management (WM) Elevating Sustainability Leader Tara Hemmer To COO
summary: Earlier this week, Waste Management appointed long-time executive Tara Hemmer as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, while announcing the upcoming July retirement of Senior Vice President Rafael Carrasco and a realignment of the WM Healthcare Solutions reporting structure. Hemmer’s expanded remit, which combines oversight of day-to-day operations with leadership of recycling, renewable energy and advisory services, highlights how deeply Waste Management is embedding...
